missions.title: Restart beast bridge — process not running
Restart vision bridge — process not running

DOCX-QP M4: Design layout engine v3 for avengers_docx_toolkit_v3.py — smart page breaks (no question splits), 2-column MCQ layout, answer key auto-generation, CBSE/ICSE/state header templates (3 variants), dynamic marks alignment, watermark support, bilingual Hindi+English section headers. Output: complete Python code for layout functions.

DOCX-QP M3: Build Biology + Math + CS diagram functions for avengers_docx_toolkit_v3.py — heart cross-section, leaf structure, digestive system, flower parts, neuron (improved), mitosis stages, coordinate geometry plotter, histogram/bar/pie chart generator, flowchart generator, binary tree. Plus build qp_benchmark.py scoring engine (0-10 on layout, diagrams, completeness, CBSE compliance).

DOCX-QP M2: Build Physics + Chemistry diagram functions for avengers_docx_toolkit_v3.py — lens ray diagram, prism refraction, electric field lines, magnetic field lines, force body diagram, velocity-time graph, wave diagram, solenoid, Bohr atom, electrolysis, distillation apparatus. Each must be high-quality matplotlib, professional, exam-ready.

DOCX-QP M1: Research CBSE 2025-26 sample board papers — extract exact diagram list, exam format, section structure, marks breakdown for Class 10 Science, Math, Social Science, English. Output: structured JSON spec.
DOCX-QP-SUPREME: Build human-beating CBSE QP skill
